folio.label: 142v
folio.l: ¢ The Pardoners owyn Prologe

note.notetxt: L IR1The rubric is in the header .ODR

folio.l: Lordynges quod he , in chirches whan I preche
I peyne me , to haue , an hauteyn speche
And rynge out , as round , as gootú a belle
For I can al by rote , that I telle
First I ¸nounce , whennes that I come
And thanne myne Bulles shewe I , alle and some
Oure liege lordes seel , on my patente
I shewe first , my body to warente
That no man be so bold , ne preest ne Clerk
Me to distourbe , of Cristes holy werk
And after that , than telle I fortú my tales
Bulles of Popes , and of Cardynales
Of Patriarkes , and of Busshopes I shewe
And in latyn speke I , wordes fewe
To Saffron witú , my predicacioun
In euäy village , and in euäy toun
This is my Teme , and shal , and euäe was
Radix malorum, est Cupiditas
Thanne shewe I fortú , my longe cristal stones
I crammed ful of cloutes , and of bones
Relikes ben they , as wenen they ichon
Tha~ne haue I in a lotou~ , a shulder bon~
Whicú that was , of an holy Iewes Sheep~
Goode men I seye , take of my wordes keep~
If that this bon , be wasshe in any welle
If Cow or Calf or Oxe , or Sheep~ swelle
That any worm hatú ete , or worm I stonge

note.notetxt: stonge27 There is an ink blotch.Est

folio.l: Take water of that welle , and wasshe his tonge
And it is hool a noon , and forthere more
Of pokkes and of Scabbe , and euäy sore
Shal euäy Sheep~ be hool , that of this welle
Drynketú a draugúte , take kepe eke what I telle
If that the goode man , that the bestes owetú
Wol euäy wyke , er that the Cok hiö crowetú
Fastyngö drynken , of this welle a draugúte
As thilke holy Iew , oure eldres taugúte
His bestes and his stoor , shal multiplie
And Sire also , it heletú Ialousie
For thougú a man be falle , in Ialous rage
Lat maken witú this water , his potage
And neuäe shal he more , his wyf mys triste
Thougú he the Sothe , of hire defaute wiste
Al hadde she taken Preestes , two or thre
¢ Heere is a Miteyn eke , that ©e may se
